libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Keep or add JVM test args and native-image build args: --add-opens=java.base/java.util=ALL-UNNAMED. This is needed for tests that exercise shaded.parquet.com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.util.ClassUtil.findEnumType on EnumSet or EnumMap; without it, JDK module encapsulation causes InaccessibleObjectException.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8256 [Automation] java run fails for org.apache.parquet:parquet-jackson:1.16.0; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The reported failure appears to be a shaded Jackson behavior/API expectation change in parquet-jackson 1.16.0 rather than a missing Maven dependency or Docker setup.
Direct assertions against deprecated/low-level JacksonAnnotationIntrospector enum-name methods may be version-sensitive; ObjectMapper round-trip behavior is a safer coverage target.
No extra Jackson dependency should be added: the artifact intentionally shades and embeds Jackson classes.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: parquet-jackson is a self-contained shaded Jackson artifact with no runtime transitive dependencies or external service, but meaningful coverage of shaded Jackson ClassUtil EnumSet/EnumMap behavior needs java.util opened on modern JDKs.
